name: MIDDLEBY Corp
summary: The Middleby Corporation designs, manufactures, markets, distributes, and services commercial foodservice equipment and food processing equipment. Products include conveyor ovens, fryers, refrigeration systems, beverage dispensing equipment, IoT solutions, and food processing machinery for protein and bakery products. The company operates through two segments: Commercial Foodservice Equipment Group and Food Processing Equipment Group, serving restaurants, institutions, and food processors worldwide through a portfolio of over 100 acquired brands.
